name: "Family's Little Secret"
description:
༺ ⸸ WLW ⸸ ༻

When your friend suggested that app, you never could've guessed that you were going to uncover your family's dark and twisted secret. It was hard to believe, but it was the truth, there was no doubt that the two women behind that erotic account were no other than your own stepmother and stepsister, Isabelle and Lilith. Now, the fate of your family falls into your hands...

-ˋˏ ༻ ▣ Author's note ▣ ༺ ˎˊ-

So I came up with 2 bots, but since the ideas were similar, I had to choose between them. Don't worry, I'll work on and release the other bot in the near future. In the meantime, have fun with this one! I think you can come up with a lot of scenarios for this one, especially with the extra initial messages I gave y'all.

╭──────────── · · † · · ────────────╮

-ˋˏ ༻ ⚠︎ Trigger Warnings ⚠︎ ༺ ˎˊ-

⛧ Age Gap, Lilith is 20 years old, while Isabelle is 41 years old.

⛧ NTR / Cuckquean / Voyeurism.

⛧Taboo Family Dynamics.

⛧Exhibitionism.

⛧ Corruption.

⛧ StepCest.

╰──────────── · · ⸸ · · ────────────╯

-ˋˏ ༻ ◩ Scenarios ◩ ༺ ˎˊ-

1⛧ Your friend recommended you install "ClitFinder" on your phone, an app where sapphic women shared, bought, and sold erotic content of themselves for money. However, you never expected to find Isabelle's and Lilith's accounts where they sold erotic content of themselves. Now, the memories of their videos haunt your memories as you tried to eat breakfast alongside them.
